steps.title: Find the one-step factor
steps.content:
When $w$ increases by $1$, the exponent $2w$ increases by $2$. So the output is multiplied by
$$(0.826)^2$$

steps.title: Compute the retained percent
steps.content:
Square the base.
$$(0.826)^2=0.682276$$
So the function keeps about $68.2\%$ of its value after each increase of $1$ in $w$.

steps.title: Convert to percent decrease
steps.content:
The decrease is the part not retained.
$$100\%-68.2\%=31.8\%$$
So $p$ is closest to $31.8$. The answer is D.
